questions.hindi: महोदय, मैं आपसे तीन दिन की छुट्टी की विनती करता हूँ।
questions.english: Sir, I request three days of leave from you.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Salutation + purpose statement + reason + polite closing request
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "Sir, I request three days of leave from you."

questions.hindi: मैं बीमार होने के कारण छुट्टी चाहता हूँ।
questions.english: I want leave because I am unwell.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Salutation + purpose statement + reason + polite closing request
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I want leave because I am unwell."

questions.hindi: कृपया मेरी छुट्टी स्वीकृत करें।
questions.english: Please approve my leave.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Salutation + purpose statement + reason + polite closing request
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "Please approve my leave."

questions.hindi: मैं इस पद के लिए आवेदन करना चाहता हूँ।
questions.english: I would like to apply for this position.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Salutation + purpose statement + reason + polite closing request
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I would like to apply for this position."

questions.hindi: मेरे पास इस काम का पर्याप्त अनुभव है।
questions.english: I have sufficient experience for this job.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Salutation + purpose statement + reason + polite closing request
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I have sufficient experience for this job."

questions.hindi: कृपया मेरा आवेदन स्वीकार करें।
questions.english: Please accept my application.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Salutation + purpose statement + reason + polite closing request
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "Please accept my application."

questions.hindi: मैं स्थानांतरण के लिए आवेदन कर रहा हूँ।
questions.english: I am applying for a transfer.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Salutation + purpose statement + reason + polite closing request
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I am applying for a transfer."

questions.hindi: मेरे परिवार की वजह से मुझे शहर बदलना है।
questions.english: I need to change my city because of my family.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Salutation + purpose statement + reason + polite closing request
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I need to change my city because of my family."

questions.hindi: मैं छात्रवृत्ति के लिए आवेदन कर रहा हूँ।
questions.english: I am applying for a scholarship.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Salutation + purpose statement + reason + polite closing request
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I am applying for a scholarship."

questions.hindi: मेरे अंक इस छात्रवृत्ति के लिए पर्याप्त हैं।
questions.english: My marks are sufficient for this scholarship.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Salutation + purpose statement + reason + polite closing request
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "My marks are sufficient for this scholarship."

questions.hindi: मुझे एक बोनाफाइड प्रमाण पत्र चाहिए।
questions.english: I need a bonafide certificate.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Salutation + purpose statement + reason + polite closing request
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I need a bonafide certificate."

questions.hindi: यह प्रमाण पत्र मुझे बैंक खाता खोलने के लिए चाहिए।
questions.english: I need this certificate to open a bank account.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Salutation + purpose statement + reason + polite closing request
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I need this certificate to open a bank account."

questions.hindi: सधन्यवाद, मैं आपकी शीघ्र प्रतिक्रिया की प्रतीक्षा करूँगा।
questions.english: Thank you, I will wait for your prompt response.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Salutation + purpose statement + reason + polite closing request
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "Thank you, I will wait for your prompt response."

questions.hindi: भवदीय।
questions.english: Yours sincerely.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Salutation + purpose statement + reason + polite closing request
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "Yours sincerely."

questions.hindi: मैं इस विद्यालय का छात्र हूँ।
questions.english: I am a student of this school.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Salutation + purpose statement + reason + polite closing request
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I am a student of this school."

questions.hindi: मेरा रोल नंबर पच्चीस है।
questions.english: My roll number is twenty-five.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Salutation + purpose statement + reason + polite closing request
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "My roll number is twenty-five."

questions.hindi: कृपया इसे तुरंत स्वीकृत करें।
questions.english: Please approve this immediately.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Salutation + purpose statement + reason + polite closing request
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "Please approve this immediately."

questions.hindi: मुझे आपके सकारात्मक जवाब की उम्मीद है।
questions.english: I hope for your positive reply.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Salutation + purpose statement + reason + polite closing request
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I hope for your positive reply."

questions.hindi: यह मेरा पहला आवेदन है।
questions.english: This is my first application.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Salutation + purpose statement + reason + polite closing request
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "This is my first application."

questions.hindi: मैं इस अवसर के लिए आभारी रहूँगा।
questions.english: I will be grateful for this opportunity.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Salutation + purpose statement + reason + polite closing request
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I will be grateful for this opportunity."
